meaning: 班扬(美国民间故事中的伐木巨人,力大无比,后成为美国巨大与力量的象征,并用作木材公司的广告形象)
examples: Who is this Paul Bunyan with the truck?
Paul Bunyan was a hero in American folk tales.
Peter Bunyan, an officer with Devon and Cornwall Police, was found guilty of one count.
Her niece Abigail McHugh, 19, of Swindon, and Daniel Bunyan, 23, of Abingdon, also deny the charges.
Only skipper Jason Bunyan and Klaus Jakobsen remain from the team that ended 2009 at Loomer Road.
